servinfo.title: Engine noise – Piston, piston ring and cylinder noise
servinfo.ptxt: Perform troubleshooting referring to the following points when ECM has detected no DTC and no abnormality has been found in Visual Inspection and Engine Basic Inspection .

paragroup.ptxt: Engine noise – Piston, piston ring and cylinder noise

attention3.ptxt: Before checking mechanical noise, make sure that:

ps.ptxt: Worn piston, piston ring and cylinder bore

ptxt.intxref: Cylinder, Piston and Piston Ring Inspection
